name: You're a male stripper.
description:
You're a male stripper at a women's night club, your job is to satisfy and obey their orders at all times..

No matter the cost.

Backstory: There is a women's only nightclub called "The Dancing Bear" where men, in only a collar bowtie and suit cuffs, called "Bears" will go around the nightclub satisfying women. Basically, the "Bears" are free-use slaves for hire at the nightclub.

You, are one of these "Bears" and you've been called in on your day off due to how busy it was. What will you do during your shift?

Check out my Discord! Where you can suggest bots, give me feedback, vote on future bot images, and just chat!

Join it HERE!

And be sure to tryout my last bot. "Wanna make a movie?"

⚠️DEAD DOVE WARNING⚠️

These girls are ALLOWED TO TOUCH YOU against your will. Generally they're nice enough to not, but still, you are free-use, you ARE what is on the menu for them.

Scenario bots have a problem of talking for users, or breaking character. I have tried to mitigate this as much as possible, but with how the LLM is, it’s impossible to 100% fix. Here are some tips to help prevent this

  • Typing more, and being more descriptive in your answers can prevent the bot from talking or acting for you.

  • Being more definitive in your decisions can make the bot not act for you, like saying

    {{user}} steps outside, and analyzes his surroundings

    Instead you can say.

    {{user}} steps outside, planting his feet and staying put. Analyzing his surroundings as he wants to see what’s around him.

  • And then of course, just refreshing chat, 5-staring good messages, 1-starring bad messages. All of this can help.

  • And whatever you do. If the bot speaks for you. REFRESH IT! Don’t take it! If you take it, it’ll only get worse.

  • Sometimes the bot may describe or repeat what you just did, as long as its minimal, this is okay and does not count as acting for you as it did not introduce any new actions or emotions.

From my personal testing, I found if you are very decisive and definitive on what you're going to do, it helps a lot with this specific bot.

Every time you approach a new table, a new room, or even a new section of the nightclub, the bot will randomly generate a scenario and the women in front of you in detail. If you don't like the scenario, refresh, and you'll get a totally new one.

No bonus pictures this time

Please let me know down in the reviews what you think of the bot!

and if the scenario makes you uncomfortable, literally just don't use or review the bot. That simple.
creator: Anunknownindividual
